item.title: Senior Java FullStack Developer (m/w/d)
item.description:
At uRemoTech, we develop modern software solutions for demanding customers. We are looking for an experienced Java FullStack Developer (m/f/d) who is just as comfortable with backend as frontend development—and who not only implements software, but also actively helps to shape it.

If you enjoy clean architecture, modern frameworks, and pragmatic solutions, and like to take on responsibility, then you’ve come to the right place.

About uRemoTech

uRemoTech is a 100% remote IT consulting company based near Kiel in Schleswig-Holstein. We support companies throughout Germany in implementing modern infrastructure, cloud, and software solutions. In recent years, we have successfully implemented projects for well-known customers such as Daimler, the DFB, and E.ON.

Your tasks

  • Development of modern front-end and back-end solutions in an agile environment.
  • Collaboration with other consultants and developers to find the best solutions.
  • Familiarization with new technologies and continuous expansion of your knowledge.

What you bring to the table

  • At least 6 years of professional experience in software development.
  • Backend experience with Java or Kotlin and a Java framework (e.g., Spring, Quarkus).
  • Frontend experience with at least one common framework: React, Angular, or Vue.
  • Team player, problem-solving skills, independence
  • Very good German and good English skills.
  • Good communication skills and customer focus.
  • Flexibility for remote work and occasional on-site appointments.

What we offer

  • Permanent full-time contract.
  • 100% remote work with flexible hours.
  • Varied projects with well-known customers
  • Active promotion of further education, training, and conferences
  • Modern hardware (MacBook)
  • Attractive salary depending on experience
  • 30 days of vacation
  • Additional benefits such as JobRad, gym subsidy, and Deutschlandticket

Interested?

Then apply directly HERE with your resume!

We look forward to getting to know you better and talking to you about your new job.

item.title: Senior SRE / Platform Engineer (m/w/d)
item.description:
At uRemoTech, we build modern, reliable platforms for demanding customers. To do this, we are looking for an experienced SRE / Platform Engineer (m/f/d) who not only operates infrastructure, but also actively designs, automates, and continuously improves it.

If you enjoy cloud technologies, Kubernetes, and stable platforms and like to take on responsibility, then you’ve come to the right place.

About uRemoTech

uRemoTech is a 100% remote IT consulting company based near Kiel in Schleswig-Holstein. We support companies throughout Germany in implementing modern infrastructure, cloud, and software solutions. In recent years, we have successfully implemented projects for well-known customers such as Daimler, the DFB, and E.ON.

Your tasks

  • Setting up, operating, and further developing infrastructures based on VMs and Kubernetes/OpenShift
  • Working with private and public cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  • Implementation of CI/CD pipelines and GitOps processes.
  • Monitoring of environments including automated alerting
  • Technical consulting and collaboration with our customers

What you bring to the table

  • At least 5 years of experience in IT infrastructure
  • Very good knowledge of Kubernetes or OpenShift (alternatively: managed services such as EKS, AKS, or GKE)
  • Experience with at least one cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
  • Practical experience with CI/CD and GitOps tools (e.g., GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Argo CD, Flux CD)
  • Good knowledge of automation and deployment processes
  • Very good German and good English skills
  • Independent, structured way of working and strong customer focus
  • Ability to work in a team, strong communication skills, and problem-solving skills
  • Flexibility for remote work and occasional on-site appointments.

Desirable

  • Experience with infrastructure as code (e.g., Terraform, Ansible)
  • Knowledge of monitoring and observability tools such as Prometheus and Grafana
  • Experience in consulting projects or direct customer contact

What we offer you

  • Permanent full-time contract
  • 100% remote work with flexible hours
  • Varied projects with well-known clients
  • Active promotion of further education, training, and conferences
  • Modern hardware (MacBook)
  • Attractive salary depending on experience
  • 30 days of vacation
  • Additional benefits such as JobRad, gym subsidy, and Deutschlandticket

Interested?

Then apply directly HERE with your resume!

We look forward to getting to know you better and talking to you about your new job.
